allow:
Bash(git commit -m "$(cat <<''EOF''
Fix DataTables date sorting for DD/MM/YYYY format

- Added moment.js library for date parsing
- Implemented DataTables moment plugin for DD/MM/YYYY dates
- Changed default sort to Registration Date (newest first)
- Applied date sorting to Birth Date and Registration Date columns
- New webhook students now appear at top of list by default

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
)")

Bash(git commit -m "$(cat <<''EOF''
Align create/edit student forms with Elementor registration form (127 fields)

**Forms Updated:**
- Updated create.blade.php from 26 fields to 127 comprehensive fields
- Updated edit.blade.php to match create form with all fields populated
- Both forms now match the public Elementor registration form exactly

**Sections Added:**
1. Student Personal Information (photo, name, gender, DOB, citizenship, birth cert, religion, country, nationality, ethnicity, contact, email, address)
2. SEA Information (date, primary school, SEA slip, SEA number)
3. Transfer Information (status, slip, reason, date, previous class/school, location)
4. Medical Information (condition, blood type, allergies, immunization)
5. Special Needs & Intervention (family crisis, counselling, disabilities, educational aid, concessions, emotional factors)
6. Personal Preferences (school feeding, social welfare, transport, device access, internet)
7. Mother Information (name, living status, death cert, ID, address, contact, profession, work address, email)
8. Father Information (same structure as mother)
9. Emergency Contact (name, address, relation, contact number)
10. Registrant Information (date, relationship, name, ID, nationality, email)

**StudentService Updated:**
- Added logic to concatenate student_first_name + student_last_name into student_name
- Applied to both createStudent() and updateStudent() methods
- Ensures consistency between webhook submissions and manual entries

**Result:**
- Students added manually via admin panel now have same comprehensive data structure as Elementor form submissions
- Data consistency across all entry points

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
)")
